reviewer.displayName: Gino Valentini En Moto por Argentina

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar!! Hace algunos años pasé por acá y ahora estoy acá por unos días y fui a desayunar y la verdad la atención de las chicas es increíble!! Luego cargué combustible y lo mismo!! Una excelente atención!! Hasta me regalaron un par de calcos que acá pongo en las fotos!! Súper recomendable!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place!! I passed through here a few years ago and now I'm here for a few days. I went for breakfast and the service from the girls was incredible!! Then I filled up with gas and it was the same!! Excellent service!! They even gave me a couple of stickers, which I've included in the photos!! Highly recommended!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCbHFPN09REAE
